taxModel.taxNote: U.S. Treasury interest is exempt from state and local income tax — meaningful in CA, NY, and other high-tax states.

parkCopy.short: Buy the short-duration T-bill basket — daily liquid, state-tax-free.
parkCopy.medium: Lock 6–12 months with daily-liquid short Treasury ETFs.
parkCopy.long: Stretch to 5y for term premium without giving up ETF liquidity.
parkCopy.ultra: Long-duration Treasuries — convexity to Fed cuts.

taxModel.taxNote: Eurozone interest taxation varies by country. UCITS distributions usually face local withholding; bond ETFs may be more efficient than direct holdings depending on residence.

parkCopy.short: Park EUR cash with daily-liquid ultrashort EUR bond ETFs.
parkCopy.medium: Lock 6–12 months in EUR money-market UCITS.
parkCopy.long: Eurozone government-bond ETFs — term premium with diversification.
parkCopy.ultra: Long-duration eurozone govies — convexity to ECB cuts.

taxModel.taxNote: Gilts are exempt from UK Capital Gains Tax — the coupon is taxable as income, but capital appreciation is not. Worth ~25–45 bps depending on bracket and holding period.

parkCopy.short: Park GBP cash with daily-liquid ultrashort sterling bond ETFs.
parkCopy.medium: Lock 6–12 months in sterling money-market funds or short gilts.
parkCopy.long: UK gilts — term premium plus CGT exemption.
parkCopy.ultra: Long gilts — high convexity to BoE cuts.

taxModel.taxNote: Multi-currency baskets: tax outcomes depend on the jurisdiction where the wrapper is held. UCITS ETFs domiciled in Ireland/Luxembourg are typically the most tax-efficient for non-US/non-UK investors.

parkCopy.short: Diversified multi-currency cash basket — USD T-bills, EUR + GBP ultrashorts.
parkCopy.medium: Global short-bond mix with an inflation-protection sleeve.
parkCopy.long: Global investment-grade aggregate — broad currency + credit diversification.
parkCopy.ultra: Global haven complex — long Treasuries, global agg, linkers.
